# openai_group_role (Resource)

Manage an organization-level role assignment for a group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_group_role" "example" {
  group_id = "group_123"
  role_id  = "role_123"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) group id
- `role_id` (String) role id
